title: limonium ochranthum
intro: Limonium ochranthum, also known as sea lavender, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Limonium ochranthum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
